name: how-to-explain
description: Audience-aware explanation craft for Codex, with optional Notion grounding through a Tools database.

interface.longDescription: Turns facts, code, systems, philosophy, debugging results, and technical decisions into goal-driven explanations. For full behavior, this plugin expects a Notion database named Tools with a User Preferences page and inheritance properties documented in docs/tools-db-dependency.md. Without Notion access, the skill falls back to local reference files.
defaultPrompt: Use how-to-explain to explain this concept.
Explain why this failed and what model fixes it.
Compare these ideas with a clear mental model.
